name: goliath/contact-bottom-info
title: Contact Bottom Info
description: Full-width section with a team photo on the left and a description paragraph plus four benefit items (tick list) on the right.

description.default: Our expert team will visit your facility, assess your racking condition, identify damage and risk areas, and provide a detailed quote with no obligation. Most assessments are completed within 48 hours of booking.

benefit1Subtitle.default: Complete damage assessment and risk mapping

benefit2Subtitle.default: Transparent pricing with no hidden costs

benefit3Subtitle.default: Tailored solutions for your specific needs
